_about: Provider-native supplement for Z.AI models available ahead of the OpenRouter snapshot. GLM-5.2 is documented in Z.AI's Coding Plan docs with model id glm-5.2, 1M context, and 131072 max output tokens. Z.AI has not listed GLM-5.2 on the public token pricing table yet, so this manifest uses the current GLM-5.1 token price until a GLM-5.2 API price is published.
